_comment: 驱逐系第1条·人际版(排播表#1)。主题图/词图/动效逐集逐词定制，本集设计如下。

hook.vi: Những kiểu người này sẽ tránh xa bạn.
hook.pinyin: zhè lèi rén jiāng yuǎn lí nǐ
hook.themePrompt: a calm gender-neutral young adult stands inside a pale-gold protective circle while six harmful symbols move outward: a wilted rose with cracked heart, a two-faced paper mask, a snapped red trust ribbon, a long-nosed liar mask, a thorny green eye, and a small gray rain cloud with a broken horseshoe

words.imagePrompt: a flashy insincere young man offers a red rose while hiding a second broken heart behind his back; a bright decisive energy sweep pushes him away and shatters the false rose, symbolic and nonviolent
a sneaky small masked figure crouches behind a friendly paper mask with crossed fingers, exposed by a bright golden spotlight as the disguise crumbles into colorful pieces
two hands that once clasped are pulled apart as a red trust ribbon between them snaps cleanly, broken promise fragments fly outward under a sharp white-blue slash of light
a smiling white theater mask splits open to reveal a long cartoon liar nose and crossed speech bubbles, the false mask peels away in bright purple and cyan fragments
a symbolic green jealous eye glares from a cracked hand mirror while thorny green smoke curls around it; a warm golden beam breaks the mirror and blows the jealousy away

a small charcoal rain cloud, broken umbrella, scattered unlucky dice and snapped horseshoe are swept rapidly away from the viewer by a bright golden gust, energetic and playful rather than frightening
